zh.Aldwark, Yorkshire, England, United King: 英國英格蘭越可爾阿爾德瓦可
zh.Tickhill, Yorkshire, England, United Kin: 英國英格蘭越可爾迪可爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Clarell於大約1146年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾迪可爾時，他的父親Radulphus de Clarell17歲，母親Sybill de Sancta Maria18歲。他於大約1178年與Ada de Maureward在英國英格蘭越可爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1185年在英國越可爾多卡斯特享年40歲，埋葬在英國越可爾迪可爾。

zh-hans.Aldwark, Yorkshire, England, United King: 英国英格兰越可爾阿爾德瓦可
zh-hans.Tickhill, Yorkshire, England, United Kin: 英国英格兰越可爾迪可爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William de Clarell于大约1146年出生在英国英格兰越可爾迪可爾时，他的父亲Radulphus de Clarell17岁，母亲Sybill de Sancta Maria18岁。他于大约1178年与Ada de Maureward在英国英格兰越可爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1185年在英国越可爾多卡斯特享年40岁，埋葬在英国越可爾迪可爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Clarell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Catalan: from clavell ‘clove’, earlier also ‘nail’, applied as a metonymic occupational name for a spice trader or a nail maker.

variants.name: Clavel
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Alfredo, Angel, Bernardina, Carlos, Consuelo, Fernando, Gustavo, Jeronimo, Jorge, Luis, Margarita.  French Andre, Eugenie, Fernande, Jean-Claude, Pierre.
Spanish: from clavel ‘clove’, earlier also ‘nail’, applied as a metonymic occupational name for a spice trader or a nail maker.
French: from Old French clavel ‘bolt (of a door or gate)’ or ‘nail, link, ring (of chain mail)’, used as a metonymic occupational name for a maker or seller. Compare Clewell .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Clarell was born about 1146, in Tickhill, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Radulphus de Clarell, was 17 and his mother, Sybill de Sancta Maria, was 18. He married Ada de Maureward about 1178, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died in 1185, in Doncaster, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 40, and was buried in Tickhill, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Clarell est né environ 1146, à Tickhill, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Radulphus de Clarell, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Sybill de Sancta Maria, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Ada de Maureward environ 1178, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé en 1185, à Doncaster, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 40 ans, et a été enterré à Tickhill, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als William de Clarell um 1146 in Tickhill, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Radulphus de Clarell 17 und seine Mutter Sybill de Sancta Maria 18. Er hat um 1178 in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Ada de Maureward geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb 1185 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Doncaster, Yorkshire, England und wurde in Tickhill, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William de Clarell è nato il circa 1146 nel Tickhill, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Radulphus de Clarell, aveva 17 anni e il suo madre, Sybill de Sancta Maria, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Ada de Maureward circa 1178, nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel 1185, nel Doncaster, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 40 anni, e fu sepolto a Tickhill, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Clarellが約1146年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアティックヒルで生まれた時，父Radulphus de Clarellは17歳，母Sybill de Sancta Mariaは18歳であった。約1178年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアでAda de Maurewardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1185年にイギリスヨークシュアイアドンカスターで40歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアティックヒルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William de Clarell(이)가 대략 1146년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 티크힐에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Radulphus de Clarell(은)는 17세였고, 그의 어머니 Sybill de Sancta Maria(은)는 18세였다. 그는 대략 1178년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 Ada de Maureward(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1185년 영국 요르크실르 돈카스터에서 40세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 티크힐에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William de Clarell nasceu aproximadamente 1146, em Tickhill, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Radulphus de Clarell, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Sybill de Sancta Maria, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Ada de Maureward aproximadamente 1178, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1185, em Doncaster, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 40 anos, e foi sepultado em Tickhill, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Clarell родился около 1146 г. в местности тиккхилл, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Radulphus de Clarell было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Sybill de Sancta Maria, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Ada de Maureward около 1178 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер в 1185 г. в местности донкастир, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 40 лет и был похоронен в местности тиккхилл, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William de Clarell nació aproximadamente 1146, en Tickhill, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Radulphus de Clarell, tenía 17 años y su mamá, Sybill de Sancta Maria, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Ada de Maureward aproximadamente 1178, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en 1185, en Doncaster, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 40 años, y fue sepultado en Tickhill, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
